economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in Squiala Holdings Limited Partnership (100%), Squiala Holdings GP Inc. (100%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14.3%), and Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11.1%). CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative Funding of $2,059,230 received and deferred. Eagle Landing Development LP land lease deferred revenue of $14,408,455.
notes: No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Four entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs): Squiala Holdings LP, Squiala Holdings GP Inc., Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP, and Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society. Large swing in prior year revenue ($15M vs $6M current year) partly due to $10M in economic activity and other revenue in 2023 vs $2.1M in 2024, and member support expenses of $3.27M in 2023 vs $488K in 2024. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative funding of $2,059,230 fully deferred. Remeasurement gains of $1,152,252 recognized in 2024 vs losses of $(407,898) in 2023. No long-term debt reported. Social programs expenses combined Social Programs ($440,419) and Social Development ($583,918) = $1,024,337.
